infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ReelWall uses your camera to let you capture fish photos and add them to your private catch wall.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ReelWall uses your photo library so you can upload existing fish photos, edit catch details, and choose which catches to mount on ReelWall.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: ReelWall saves generated share images to your photo library only when you choose to export or share a catch card.
